description.example: Meeting to provide technical review for 'Phoenix' design.

tts_entity.name: TTS Entity
tts_entity.description: The TTS entity to use for text-to-speech.

message.name: Message
message.example: Hello, this is a test message.

voice.name: Voice
voice.description: Voice to use for speech generation (overrides entity default). Voices marked with · gpt-4o-mini-tts only are exclusive to the gpt-4o-mini-tts model and will be rejected by tts-1 / tts-1-hd. For custom TTS backends, you can type any voice name.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Speed of the speech (0.25-4.0). 1.0 is normal speed.

instructions.name: Instructions
instructions.description: Speaking style instructions for OpenAI gpt-4o-mini-tts model (e.g., "speak like a pirate"). May not be supported by custom backends.

extra_payload.name: Extra Payload
extra_payload.description: Additional JSON payload to merge with the API request. Useful for custom TTS backends that need extra parameters.

chime.name: Play Chime
chime.description: * Disables streaming (post-processing required). Play a chime sound before speaking. Falls back to the profile setting when omitted.

chime_sound.name: Chime Sound
chime_sound.description: * Disables streaming (post-processing required). Filename of the chime sound to play.

normalize_audio.name: Normalize Audio
normalize_audio.description: * Disables streaming (post-processing required). Apply loudness normalization. Falls back to the profile setting when omitted.

volume.name: Volume
volume.description: Override speaker volume for this announcement (0.0-1.0).

pause_playback.name: Pause Playback
pause_playback.description: Pause any currently playing media during announcement. Falls back to the profile setting when omitted.

say.description: Use the OpenAI TTS engine to speak a message with optional features.
say.name: OpenAI TTS Speak

refresh.description: Force refresh all sensor data for this integration.
refresh.name: Refresh

set_video_profile_mode.description: Sets the video profile mode to day or night
set_video_profile_mode.name: Set Dahua Video Profile Mode To Day or Night

set_focus_zoom.description: Sets the camera's focus and zoom
set_focus_zoom.name: Set the Dahua Focus and Zoom

index.name: Index
index.description: The mask index. 0 is the first mask

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: If true enables the mask, otherwise disables it

set_privacy_masking.description: Enables or disabled the cameras privacy masking
set_privacy_masking.name: Set the Dahua Privacy Masking

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: If the overlay is enabled or not

enable_channel_title.name: Enable Channel Title Overlay

enable_time_overlay.name: Enable Channel Time Overlay

group.name: Group

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: If the overlay is enabled or not

enable_text_overlay.description: Enables or disable the channel text video overaly
enable_text_overlay.name: Enable Channel Text Overlay

group.name: Group

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: If the overlay is enabled or not

enable_custom_overlay.name: Enable Channel Custom Text Overlay

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: If true all IVS rules are enabled. If false, all are disabled

enable_all_ivs_rules.description: Enables of disables all IVS rules based on the supplied 'enabled' param
enable_all_ivs_rules.name: Enable or Disable All IVS rules

index.name: Index
index.description: The rule index. 0 is a hidden rule, so usually the first rule is rule 1

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: If true enables the IVS rule, otherwise disables it

enable_ivs_rule.description: Enables of disable a single IVS rule based on the supplied 'enabled' param
enable_ivs_rule.name: Enable or Disable IVS rule

vto_open_door.description: Open a door via a VTO (Doorbell) for supported devices
vto_open_door.name: Open a door via a VTO

set_channel_title.description: Sets a title on the video
set_channel_title.name: Sets Channel Title

group.name: Group
group.description: Multiple custom text groups can exist. The default 1 should be used in most cases

set_text_overlay.description: Sets a text overlay on the video
set_text_overlay.name: Set text overlay

group.name: Group
group.description: Multiple custom text groups can exist. The default 0 should be used in most cases

set_custom_overlay.description: Sets a custom text overlay on the video
set_custom_overlay.name: Set Custom Text Overlay

config_type.name: Config Type
config_type.description: The config type: general, day, night

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: The mode: Auto, Color, BlackWhite. Note Auto is also known as Brightness by Dahua

set_video_in_day_night_mode.description: Set the camera's Day/Night Mode. For example, Color, BlackWhite, or Auto
set_video_in_day_night_mode.name: Set the Day or Night Color Mode

set_record_mode.description: Sets the record mode (on/off or auto). On is always on recording. Off is always off. Auto based on motion settings, etc.
set_record_mode.name: Set Record Mode on Dahua Camera

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: The infrared mode: Auto, On, Off

brightness.name: Brightness
brightness.description: The infrared brightness, from 0 to 100 inclusive. 100 is the brightest

set_infrared_mode.description: Set the infrared light settings on a Dahua camera
set_infrared_mode.name: Set Infrared Mode on Dahua Camera

goto_preset_position.description: Go to a position already preset
goto_preset_position.name: Go to a preset position
